nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
nodes.summary: 菲利普·斯克莱特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联79种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等79种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: 亚马孙蚁鵙
nodes.summary: 亚马孙蚁鵙（Amazonian antshrike，学名 Thamnophilus amazonicus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

links.key: bird-亚马孙蚁鵙-bfccac2b__distributed_in__loc-菲利普-斯克莱特-0722f03b
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Amazonian antshrike (Thamnophilus amazonicus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: paraensis: Brazil south of the Amazon east from the Tocantins River to western Maranhão The Amazonian antshrike inhabits somewhat different landscapes across its range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: obscurus also inhabits edges but occurs as well in the forest interior, dense secondary forest, and stands of Guadua bamboo in terra firme and transitional forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered fairly common in Colombia, local in Ecuador, uncommon and local in Peru, locally common in Venezuela, and uncommon to locally common elsewhere. It occurs in "vast areas of protected suitable habitat" and "adapts well to second growth in some portions of its range, thus rendering it less vulnerable to habitat disturbance"
